channel.title: 文韬的文档
channel.description: 简单记录工作总结💼，学习整理。💰🍺

item.title: 双屏动画
item.author: huang8604@163.com (wentao)
item.description:
<h2 id="目标" class="heading-element"><span>目标：</span>
 <a href="#%e7%9b%ae%e6%a0%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p><a class="lightgallery" href="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/10/17/6710e06e654de.gif?size=large" data-thumbnail="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/10/17/6710e06e654de.gif?size=small" data-sub-html="<h2>45d40ecaa001304584a749db64e73c80_MD5</h2>"><img loading="lazy" src="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/10/17/6710e06e654de.gif" alt="45d40ecaa001304584a749db64e73c80_MD5" srcset="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/10/17/6710e06e654de.gif?size=small, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/10/17/6710e06e654de.gif?size=medium 1.5x, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/10/17/6710e06e654de.gif?size=large 2x" data-title="45d40ecaa001304584a749db64e73c80_MD5" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<h2 id="任务分析和分解" class="heading-element"><span>任务分析和分解：</span>
 <a href="#%e4%bb%bb%e5%8a%a1%e5%88%86%e6%9e%90%e5%92%8c%e5%88%86%e8%a7%a3" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p><a href="#%E4%B8%80%20%E7%9B%91%E5%90%AC%E5%A4%9A%E6%8C%87%E4%BA%8B%E4%BB%B6">#一 监听多指事件</a><br>
<a href="#%E4%BA%8C%20%E4%BB%BB%E5%8A%A1%E8%B7%A8%E5%B1%8F%E7%A7%BB%E5%8A%A8">#二 任务跨屏移动</a></p>
<h4 id="一-监听多指事件" class="heading-element"><span>一 监听多指事件</span>
 <a href="#%e4%b8%80-%e7%9b%91%e5%90%ac%e5%a4%9a%e6%8c%87%e4%ba%8b%e4%bb%b6" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>监听手指事件可以参考SystemGesturesPointerEventListener.java<br>
通过继承实现PointerEventListener 实现</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span><span class="lnt">6
</span><span class="lnt">7
</span><span class="lnt">8
</span><span class="lnt">9
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-java" data-lang="java"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">android.view.WindowManagerPolicyConstants.PointerEventListener</span><span class="p">;</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="n">实现其中的方法</span><span class="err">：</span><span class="w"> 
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="nd">@Override</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="kd">public</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kt">void</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">onPointerEvent</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">MotionEvent</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">motionEvent</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w"> 
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="c1">//实现其中的 down move up 事件</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h4 id="二-任务跨屏移动" class="heading-element"><span>二 任务跨屏移动</span>
 <a href="#%e4%ba%8c-%e4%bb%bb%e5%8a%a1%e8%b7%a8%e5%b1%8f%e7%a7%bb%e5%8a%a8" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p><a class="lightgallery" href="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/10/16/670f65bcb57d2.png?size=large" data-thumbnail="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/10/16/670f65bcb57d2.png?size=small" data-sub-html="<h2>3f862f7353fd7a9cbf45970c70f60729_MD5</h2>"><img loading="lazy" src="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/10/16/670f65bcb57d2.png" alt="3f862f7353fd7a9cbf45970c70f60729_MD5" srcset="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/10/16/670f65bcb57d2.png?size=small, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/10/16/670f65bcb57d2.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/10/16/670f65bcb57d2.png?size=large 2x" data-title="3f862f7353fd7a9cbf45970c70f60729_MD5" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-java" data-lang="java"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">我们在DisplayContent里面做功能实现</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="n">mRootWindowContainer</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">moveRootTaskToDisplay</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">rootTaskId</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="n">otherDisplay</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">mDisplayId</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span><span class="o">//</span><span class="n">把task移动到另一屏</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h4 id="三-移动动画方案-虚拟镜像屏幕" class="heading-element"><span>三 移动动画方案-虚拟镜像屏幕</span>
 <a href="#%e4%b8%89-%e7%a7%bb%e5%8a%a8%e5%8a%a8%e7%94%bb%e6%96%b9%e6%a1%88-%e8%99%9a%e6%8b%9f%e9%95%9c%e5%83%8f%e5%b1%8f%e5%b9%95" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>方案：</p>
<p>镜像模式与真实镜像坐标是同步的。</p>
<p><a class="lightgallery" href="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/10/17/6710e059b3c7a.png?size=large" data-thumbnail="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/10/17/6710e059b3c7a.png?size=small" data-sub-html="<h2>9f22d9e76d5eb07ecbe9add86a7b36e0_MD5</h2>"><img loading="lazy" src="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/10/17/6710e059b3c7a.png" alt="9f22d9e76d5eb07ecbe9add86a7b36e0_MD5" srcset="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/10/17/6710e059b3c7a.png?size=small, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/10/17/6710e059b3c7a.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/10/17/6710e059b3c7a.png?size=large 2x" data-title="9f22d9e76d5eb07ecbe9add86a7b36e0_MD5" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<p><a class="lightgallery" href="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/10/17/6710e059b515b.png?size=large" data-thumbnail="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/10/17/6710e059b515b.png?size=small" data-sub-html="<h2>ff470b3b344362fbce554c3ad5f54085_MD5</h2>"><img loading="lazy" src="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/10/17/6710e059b515b.png" alt="ff470b3b344362fbce554c3ad5f54085_MD5" srcset="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/10/17/6710e059b515b.png?size=small, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/10/17/6710e059b515b.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/10/17/6710e059b515b.png?size=large 2x" data-title="ff470b3b344362fbce554c3ad5f54085_MD5" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<ol>
<li>先创建镜像屏幕图层，当前状态应该是镜像图层盖在源屏幕上面。</li>
<li>将源屏幕图层，移动到屏幕1的左边。镜像对应的需要在屏幕上显示。</li>
<li>移动原有屏幕画面到右侧显示器</li>
<li>判断开始动画移动 &ndash; &gt; 更改图层坐标，动画结束后，判断是否移位 1 移位动画，2 复位动画</li>
</ol>
<p>创建镜像屏幕</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span><span class="lnt">23
</span><span class="lnt">24
</span><span class="lnt">25
</span><span class="lnt">26
</span><span class="lnt">27
</span><span class="lnt">28
</span><span class="lnt">29
</span><span class="lnt">30
</span><span class="lnt">31
</span><span class="lnt">32
</span><span class="lnt">33
</span><span class="lnt">34
</span><span class="lnt">35
</span><span class="lnt">36
</span><span class="lnt">37
</span><span class="lnt">38
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-java" data-lang="java"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//添加图层</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="n">SurfaceControl</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">copyTaskSc</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">;</span><span class="w"> 
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="n">SurfaceControl</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">copyTaskBuffer</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">;</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="n">SurfaceControl</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">realWindwosSateBuffer</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">;</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="c1">//创建一个镜像图层</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="k">if</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">copyTaskSc</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">==</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">){</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">	</span><span class="n">makeChildSurface</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">).</span><span class="na">setName</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;copyTaskSc&#34;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">				</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">setParent</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">getWindowingLayer</span><span class="p">())</span><span class="w"> 
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">				</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">build</span><span class="p">();</span><span class="c1">// getWindowingLayer 在app上吗</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">				
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="k">if</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">copyTaskBuffer</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">==</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">){</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">	</span><span class="c1">//镜像一个task的 surfacecontrol ---- copyTaskBuffer </span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">	</span><span class="c1">//surfacecontrol里面其实有一个layer</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">	</span><span class="n">copyTaskBuffer</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">SurfaceContrl</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">mirrorSurface</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">rootTask</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">getSurfaceControl</span><span class="p">());</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">	</span><span class="c1">//原生的一个</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">	</span><span class="n">realWindwosSateBuffer</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">rootTask</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">getSurfaceControl</span><span class="p">();</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">	</span><span class="c1">//获取一个事务 SurfaceContrl.Transaction t = mWmSerivce.mTransactionFactory.get();</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">	</span><span class="c1">//把 拷贝的 copyTaskBuffer 放到了 copyTaskSc 下面，copyTaskSc 在原来的屏幕下面</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">	</span><span class="n">t</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">reparent</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">copyTaskBuffer</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="n">copyTaskSc</span><span class="p">);</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">	</span><span class="c1">//显示图层</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">	</span><span class="n">t</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">show</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">copyTaskSc</span><span class="p">);</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">	</span><span class="n">t</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">show</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">copyTaskBuffer</span><span class="p">);</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">	
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">	</span><span class="c1">//平移</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">	</span><span class="n">Matrix</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">matrix</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">new</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">Matrix</span><span class="p">();</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">	</span><span class="n">matrix</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">reset</span><span class="p">();</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">	</span><span class="n">matrix</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">postTranslate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">100</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="n">0</span><span class="p">);</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">	</span><span class="c1">//往平移</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">	</span><span class="n">t</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">setMatrix</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">copyTaskBuffer</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="n">matrix</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="k">new</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kt">float</span><span class="o">[</span><span class="n">9</span><span class="o">]</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">	
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">	</span><span class="n">t</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">apply</span><span class="p">();</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>移动屏幕到右侧，并且设置左边屏幕外面。</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-java" data-lang="java"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="c1">//由于移动到2屏幕，需要再移动到屏幕外，会有闪屏的情况，需要再移动之前，先进行移动。</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="c1">//直接调用下面的 startMoveCurrentScreenTask（0，0）</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="n">mRootWindowContainer</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">moveRootTaskToDisplay</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">rootTaskId</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="n">otherDisplay</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">mDisplayId</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span><span class="o">//</span><span class="n">把task移动到另一屏</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>动画</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">

<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-java" data-lang="java"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//移动镜像图层</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="kd">public</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kt">void</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">startMoveCurrentScreenTask</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="kt">int</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">x</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">,</span><span class="kt">int</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">y</span><span class="p">){</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">if</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">copyTaskBuffer</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">!=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">){</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">SurfaceControl</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">Transaction</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">t</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">mWnService</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">mTrasactionFactory</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">get</span><span class="p">();</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> 
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="c1">//屏幕2</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">Matrix</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">matrix</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">new</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">Matrix</span><span class="p">();</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="kt">int</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">width</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">getDisaplayINfog</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="na">logicalWIdth</span><span class="p">;</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">matrix</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">postTranslate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="n">width</span><span class="o">+</span><span class="n">x</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="n">0</span><span class="p">);</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> 
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="c1">//屏幕1</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> 	</span><span class="n">matrix</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">new</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">Matrix</span><span class="p">();</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">matrix</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">reset</span><span class="p">();</span><span class="w">

</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> 
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> 
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">t</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">setMatix</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">reaWindowStateBuffer</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="n">matrix</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="k">new</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">floatp</span><span class="o">[</span><span class="n">9</span><span class="o">]</span><span class="p">);</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">t</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">aaply</span><span class="p">();</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> 
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>

</div><p>手指抬起后处理流程：</p>
<p>如果是自动移动屏幕2，则offsetX &mdash;&ndash;&gt; 1440（width）<br>
如果是自动移动屏幕1，则offsetX &mdash;&ndash;&gt; 0（原点）</p>

</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="kt">int</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">current</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kt">int</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">animate</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">getValue</span><span class="p">();</span><span class="w">

</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">valueAnimator</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">setDuration</span><span class="p">();</span><span class="w">

<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-java" data-lang="java"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">onAnimationEnd</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="c1">//移除图层</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">SurfaceControl</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">Transaction</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">t</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">mWnService</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">mTrasactionFactory</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">get</span><span class="p">();</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">t</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">remove</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">copyBuffer</span><span class="p">);</span><span class="w">	
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">t</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">remove</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">copyTaskSc</span><span class="p">);</span><span class="w">

</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">	</span><span class="n">copyBuffer</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">;</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">	</span><span class="n">copyTaskSc</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">;</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> 
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="c1">//动画如果是返回，需要把原镜像move回去。</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">mRootWindowContainer</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">moveRootTaskToDisplay</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mCurrentTaskId</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="n">mDisplayId</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">mDisplayId</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="c1">//移动原镜像图层，从屏幕外再移动回来。</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">matrix</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">reset</span><span class="p">();</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">setMatrix</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="c1">//归零</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">targetActivity</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">mLauncherTaskBehind</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">false</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">mRootWindowContainer</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">ensureActiviesVisible</span><span class="p">();</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> 
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> 
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>

</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="c1">//桌面可以可见</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="n">targetActivity</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="na">mLauncherTaskBehind</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">true</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>

<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">//添加图层
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">SurfaceControl copyTaskSc = null;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">SurfaceControl copyTaskBuffer = null;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">SurfaceControl realWindwosSateBuffer = null;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">//add by doublescreenmove
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> public void doTestMoveTaskToOtherDisplay() {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> DisplayContent otherDisplay = null;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> if (mRootWindowContainer.getChildCount() == 2) {//检测是不是双屏
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> otherDisplay = (mRootWindowContainer.getChildAt(0) == this) ? mRootWindowContainer.getChildAt(1):mRootWindowContainer.getChildAt(0);//获取另一个屏幕的DisplayContent
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> if (otherDisplay!= this &amp;&amp; otherDisplay!= null) {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> int rootTaskId = 0;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> try {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 	
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 	 SurfaceContrl.Transaction t = mWmSerivce.mTransactionFactory.get();
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 	
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 	
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> Task rootTask = getTopRootTask();//获取当前display的顶部Task
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> if (rootTask.isActivityTypeHome()) {//home类型的task不支持移动
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> android.util.Log.i(&#34;DoubleScreen&#34;,&#34;doTestMoveTaskToOtherDisplay isActivityTypeHome&#34;);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> return;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> rootTaskId =rootTask.mTaskId;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> //创建一个镜像图层
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> if(copyTaskSc == null){
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 		makeChildSurface(null).setName(&#34;copyTaskSc&#34;)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 					.setParent(getWindowingLayer()) 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 					.build();// getWindowingLayer 在app上吗
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 					
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> if(copyTaskBuffer == null){
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 		copyTaskBuffer = SurfaceContrl.mirrorSurface(rootTask.getSurfaceControl());
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> realWindwosSateBuffer = rootTask.getSurfaceControl();
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 		t.reparent(copyTaskBuffer,copyTaskSc);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 		t.show(copyTaskSc);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 		t.show(copyTaskBuffer);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 		
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 		
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 		Matrix matrix = new Matrix();
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 		matrix.reset();
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 		matrix.postTranslate(100,0);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 		t.setMatrix(copyTaskBuffer,matrix,new float[9])
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 		
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 		t.apply();
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ensureOtherDisplayActivityVisible(ohterdisplay);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> mRootWindowContainer.moveRootTaskToDisplay(rootTaskId,otherDisplay.mDisplayId,true);//把task移动到另一屏
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }catch (Exception e) {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> android.util.Log.i(&#34;DoubleScreen&#34;,&#34;doTestMoveTaskToOtherDisplay Exception&#34;,e);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> void ensureOtherDisplayActivityVisible(DisplayContext ohter){
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 	 ActivityRecord topAcitiy = ohter.getTopAcitiy(false,false);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 	 if(topAcitiy != null){
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 	 	topAcitivty.mLauncherTaskBehind = true;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 	 }
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }

</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kn">package</span> <span class="nx">com</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nx">android</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nx">server</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nx">wm</span><span class="p">;</span>

</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="nx">android</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nx">view</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nx">MotionEvent</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="nx">android</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nx">view</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nx">WindowManagerPolicyConstants</span><span class="p">;</span>
