</div><p>其中，mTracker，本质上是VSyncPredictor：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">VsyncSchedule</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">TrackerPtr</span> <span class="n">VsyncSchedule</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">createTracker</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">PhysicalDisplayId</span> <span class="n">id</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// TODO(b/144707443): Tune constants.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">constexpr</span> <span class="n">nsecs_t</span> <span class="n">kInitialPeriod</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">60</span><span class="n">_Hz</span><span class="p">).</span><span class="n">getPeriodNsecs</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">constexpr</span> <span class="n">size_t</span> <span class="n">kHistorySize</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">20</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">constexpr</span> <span class="n">size_t</span> <span class="n">kMinSamplesForPrediction</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">6</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">constexpr</span> <span class="kt">uint32_t</span> <span class="n">kDiscardOutlierPercent</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">20</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">make_unique</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">VSyncPredictor</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">kInitialPeriod</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">kHistorySize</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">kMinSamplesForPrediction</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">kDiscardOutlierPercent</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>mDispatch本质上是VSyncDispatchTimerQueue</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">VsyncSchedule</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">DispatchPtr</span> <span class="n">VsyncSchedule</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">createDispatch</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">TrackerPtr</span> <span class="n">tracker</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">using</span> <span class="k">namespace</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">chrono_literals</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// TODO(b/144707443): Tune constants.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">constexpr</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">chrono</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">nanoseconds</span> <span class="n">kGroupDispatchWithin</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">500u</span><span class="n">s</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">constexpr</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">chrono</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">nanoseconds</span> <span class="n">kSnapToSameVsyncWithin</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">3</span><span class="n">ms</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">make_unique</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">VSyncDispatchTimerQueue</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">make_unique</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">Timer</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(),</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">tracker</span><span class="p">),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">kGroupDispatchWithin</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">count</span><span class="p">(),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">kSnapToSameVsyncWithin</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">count</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>mController本质上是VSyncReactor</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">VsyncSchedule</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">ControllerPtr</span> <span class="n">VsyncSchedule</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">createController</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">PhysicalDisplayId</span> <span class="n">id</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">VsyncTracker</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="n">tracker</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">FeatureFlags</span> <span class="n">features</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// TODO(b/144707443): Tune constants.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">constexpr</span> <span class="n">size_t</span> <span class="n">kMaxPendingFences</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">20</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="kt">bool</span> <span class="n">hasKernelIdleTimer</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">features</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">test</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">Feature</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">kKernelIdleTimer</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">reactor</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">make_unique</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">VSyncReactor</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">make_unique</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">SystemClock</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(),</span> <span class="n">tracker</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">kMaxPendingFences</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">hasKernelIdleTimer</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">reactor</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">setIgnorePresentFences</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">features</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">test</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">Feature</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">kPresentFences</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">reactor</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>VSYNC-app和VSYNC-appSf这两个信号是在EventThread维护的。看下createEventThread：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">platform</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="n">frameworks</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="n">native</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="n">services</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="n">surfaceflinger</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="n">Scheduler</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="n">Scheduler</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">cpp</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">ConnectionHandle</span> <span class="n">Scheduler</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">createEventThread</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">Cycle</span> <span class="n">cycle</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">frametimeline</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">TokenManager</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">tokenManager</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">chrono</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">nanoseconds</span> <span class="n">workDuration</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">chrono</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">nanoseconds</span> <span class="n">readyDuration</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// 根据cycle参数不同，选择是app还是appSf
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">eventThread</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">make_unique</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">impl</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">EventThread</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">cycle</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">Cycle</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Render</span> <span class="o">?</span> <span class="s">&#34;app&#34;</span> <span class="o">:</span> <span class="s">&#34;appSf&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">getVsyncSchedule</span><span class="p">(),</span> <span class="n">tokenManager</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">makeThrottleVsyncCallback</span><span class="p">(),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">makeGetVsyncPeriodFunction</span><span class="p">(),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">workDuration</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">readyDuration</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">auto</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="n">handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">cycle</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">Cycle</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Render</span> <span class="o">?</span> <span class="nl">mAppConnectionHandle</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">mSfConnectionHandle</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// 创建Connection
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">createConnection</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">eventThread</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">handle</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>EventThread的构造函数：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span><span class="lnt">23
</span><span class="lnt">24
</span><span class="lnt">25
</span><span class="lnt">26
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">EventThread</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">EventThread</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="k">const</span> <span class="kt">char</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">name</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">shared_ptr</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">scheduler</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">VsyncSchedule</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">vsyncSchedule</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">android</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">frametimeline</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">TokenManager</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">tokenManager</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ThrottleVsyncCallback</span> <span class="n">throttleVsyncCallback</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">GetVsyncPeriodFunction</span> <span class="n">getVsyncPeriodFunction</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">chrono</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">nanoseconds</span> <span class="n">workDuration</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">chrono</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">nanoseconds</span> <span class="n">readyDuration</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">:</span> <span class="n">mThreadName</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="p">),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// ATRACE名称
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">mVsyncTracer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">StringPrintf</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;VSYNC-%s&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">name</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// VSYNC计算时使用的偏移量
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">mWorkDuration</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">StringPrintf</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;VsyncWorkDuration-%s&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">name</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="n">workDuration</span><span class="p">),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// VSYNC计算时使用的偏移量
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">mReadyDuration</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">readyDuration</span><span class="p">),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mVsyncSchedule</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">vsyncSchedule</span><span class="p">)),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// 一个VSYNC请求者的具体处理类
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">mVsyncRegistration</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mVsyncSchedule</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getDispatch</span><span class="p">(),</span> <span class="n">createDispatchCallback</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="cm">/*VSync生成后的回调函数*/</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">name</span><span class="p">),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mTokenManager</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">tokenManager</span><span class="p">),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mThrottleVsyncCallback</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">throttleVsyncCallback</span><span class="p">)),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mGetVsyncPeriodFunction</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">getVsyncPeriodFunction</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">LOG_ALWAYS_FATAL_IF</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">getVsyncPeriodFunction</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="k">nullptr</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="s">&#34;getVsyncPeriodFunction must not be null&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mThread</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="kr">thread</span><span class="p">([</span><span class="k">this</span><span class="p">]()</span> <span class="n">NO_THREAD_SAFETY_ANALYSIS</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">unique_lock</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">mutex</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">lock</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mMutex</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">threadMain</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">lock</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">});</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>在上面的方法中，通过createConnection创建了VSync事件派发的通道：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">platform</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="n">frameworks</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="n">native</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="n">services</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="n">surfaceflinger</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="n">Scheduler</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="n">Scheduler</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">cpp</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">ConnectionHandle</span> <span class="n">Scheduler</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">createConnection</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">unique_ptr</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">EventThread</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">eventThread</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">ConnectionHandle</span> <span class="n">handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConnectionHandle</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="n">mNextConnectionHandleId</span><span class="o">++</span><span class="p">};</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGV</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;Creating a connection handle with ID %&#34;</span> <span class="n">PRIuPTR</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">handle</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">connection</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">createConnectionInternal</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">eventThread</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">lock_guard</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">mutex</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">lock</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mConnectionsLock</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mConnections</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">emplace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Connection</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="n">connection</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">eventThread</span><span class="p">)});</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">handle</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">EventThreadConnection</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">Scheduler</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">createConnectionInternal</span><span class="p">(</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">EventThread</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">eventThread</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">EventRegistrationFlags</span> <span class="n">eventRegistration</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">IBinder</span><span class="o">&gt;&amp;</span> <span class="n">layerHandle</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">int32_t</span> <span class="n">layerId</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="k">static_cast</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="kt">int32_t</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">LayerHandle</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">getLayerId</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">layerHandle</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">connection</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">eventThread</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">createEventConnection</span><span class="p">([</span><span class="o">&amp;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="p">{</span> <span class="n">resync</span><span class="p">();</span> <span class="p">},</span> <span class="n">eventRegistration</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mLayerHistory</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">attachChoreographer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">layerId</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">connection</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">connection</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>最终是由EventThread创建Connection：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span><span class="lnt">6
</span><span class="lnt">7
</span><span class="lnt">8
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">platform</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="n">frameworks</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="n">native</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="n">services</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="n">surfaceflinger</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="n">Scheduler</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="n">EventThread</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">cpp</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">EventThreadConnection</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">EventThread</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">createEventConnection</span><span class="p">(</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ResyncCallback</span> <span class="n">resyncCallback</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">EventRegistrationFlags</span> <span class="n">eventRegistration</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">EventThreadConnection</span><span class="o">&gt;::</span><span class="n">make</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="k">const_cast</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">EventThread</span><span class="o">*&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="k">this</span><span class="p">),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">IPCThreadState</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">self</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getCallingUid</span><span class="p">(),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">resyncCallback</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="n">eventRegistration</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h2 id="vsync-app的请求流程" class="heading-element"><span><strong>VSYNC-app的请求流程</strong></span>
 <a href="#vsync-app%e7%9a%84%e8%af%b7%e6%b1%82%e6%b5%81%e7%a8%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>VSYNC-app由EventThread维护。VSYNC-app的触发有多种因素，包括新屏幕挂载、客户端主动请求、EVentThread线程内部自发。</p>
<p>以EventThread内部自发为例：</p>

<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">EventThread</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">threadMain</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">unique_lock</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">mutex</span><span class="o">&gt;&amp;</span> <span class="n">lock</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">DisplayEventConsumers</span> <span class="n">consumers</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">while</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mState</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">State</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Quit</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">optional</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">DisplayEventReceiver</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Event</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">event</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Determine next event to dispatch.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">mPendingEvents</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">empty</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">event</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mPendingEvents</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">front</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mPendingEvents</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">pop_front</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">event</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">header</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">type</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">DisplayEventReceiver</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">DISPLAY_EVENT_HOTPLUG</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">event</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">hotplug</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">connected</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="o">!</span><span class="n">mVSyncState</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mVSyncState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">emplace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">event</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">header</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="nf">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">event</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">hotplug</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">connected</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="n">mVSyncState</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mVSyncState</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">displayId</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">event</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">header</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mVSyncState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">reset</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">bool</span> <span class="n">vsyncRequested</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">false</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Find connections that should consume this event.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">it</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mDisplayEventConnections</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">begin</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">while</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">it</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">mDisplayEventConnections</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">connection</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">it</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">promote</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">event</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="n">shouldConsumeEvent</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="n">event</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">connection</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">consumers</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">push_back</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">connection</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">vsyncRequested</span> <span class="o">|=</span> <span class="n">connection</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">vsyncRequest</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">VSyncRequest</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">None</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">++</span><span class="n">it</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">it</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mDisplayEventConnections</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">erase</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">it</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">consumers</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">empty</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">dispatchEvent</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="n">event</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">consumers</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">consumers</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">clear</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mVSyncState</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="n">vsyncRequested</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mState</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mVSyncState</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">synthetic</span> <span class="o">?</span> <span class="n">State</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="nl">SyntheticVSync</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">State</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">VSync</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGW_IF</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">mVSyncState</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s">&#34;Ignoring VSYNC request while display is disconnected&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mState</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">State</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Idle</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mState</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">State</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">VSync</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">scheduleResult</span> <span class="o">=</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mVsyncRegistration</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">schedule</span><span class="p">({.</span><span class="n">workDuration</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mWorkDuration</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">count</span><span class="p">(),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">.</span><span class="n">readyDuration</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mReadyDuration</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">count</span><span class="p">(),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">.</span><span class="n">earliestVsync</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mLastVsyncCallbackTime</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">ns</span><span class="p">()});</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">LOG_ALWAYS_FATAL_IF</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">scheduleResult</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s">&#34;Error scheduling callback&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mVsyncRegistration</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">cancel</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">mPendingEvents</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">empty</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">continue</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Wait for event or client registration/request.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mState</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">State</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Idle</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mCondition</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">wait</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">lock</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Generate a fake VSYNC after a long timeout in case the driver stalls. When the
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// display is off, keep feeding clients at 60 Hz.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">chrono</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">nanoseconds</span> <span class="n">timeout</span> <span class="o">=</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mState</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">State</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">SyntheticVSync</span> <span class="o">?</span> <span class="mi">16</span><span class="nl">ms</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="mi">1000</span><span class="n">ms</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mCondition</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">wait_for</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">lock</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">timeout</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">cv_status</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">timeout</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mState</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">State</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">VSync</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGW</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;Faking VSYNC due to driver stall for thread %s&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mThreadName</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">LOG_FATAL_IF</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">mVSyncState</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">now</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">systemTime</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">SYSTEM_TIME_MONOTONIC</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">deadlineTimestamp</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">now</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">timeout</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">count</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">expectedVSyncTime</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">deadlineTimestamp</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">timeout</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">count</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mPendingEvents</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">push_back</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">makeVSync</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mVSyncState</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">now</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">++</span><span class="n">mVSyncState</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">count</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">expectedVSyncTime</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">deadlineTimestamp</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// cancel any pending vsync event before exiting
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">mVsyncRegistration</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">cancel</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>触发VSYNC请求的是：</p>
<p>const auto scheduleResult =</p>
<p>mVsyncRegistration.schedule({.workDuration = mWorkDuration.get().count(),</p>
<p>.readyDuration = mReadyDuration.count(),</p>
<p>.earliestVsync = mLastVsyncCallbackTime.ns()});</p>
<p>LOG_ALWAYS_FATAL_IF(!scheduleResult, &ldquo;Error scheduling callback&rdquo;);</p>

<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span><span class="lnt">6
</span><span class="lnt">7
</span><span class="lnt">8
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">platform</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="n">frameworks</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="n">native</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="n">services</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="n">surfaceflinger</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="n">Scheduler</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="n">VSyncDispatchTimerQueue</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">cpp</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">ScheduleResult</span> <span class="n">VSyncCallbackRegistration</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">schedule</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">VSyncDispatch</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">ScheduleTiming</span> <span class="n">scheduleTiming</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">mToken</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">nullopt</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">mDispatch</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">schedule</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="n">mToken</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">scheduleTiming</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>

</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">ScheduleTiming</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">scheduleTiming</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">auto</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">it</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">mCallbacks</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">token</span><span class="p">);</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">if</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">it</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">==</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">mCallbacks</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">())</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">return</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{};</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">auto</span><span class="o">&amp;</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">callback</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">it</span>-&gt;<span class="nc">second</span><span class="p">;</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">auto</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">const</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">now</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">mTimeKeeper</span>-&gt;<span class="nc">now</span><span class="p">();</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> 
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="cm">/* If the timer thread will run soon, we&#39;ll apply this work update via the callback
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="cm"> * timer recalculation to avoid cancelling a callback that is about to fire. */</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">auto</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">const</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">rearmImminent</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">now</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">mIntendedWakeupTime</span><span class="p">;</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">if</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">(</span><span class="no">CC_UNLIKELY</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">rearmImminent</span><span class="p">))</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">callback</span>-&gt;<span class="nc">addPendingWorkloadUpdate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">scheduleTiming</span><span class="p">);</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">return</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">getExpectedCallbackTime</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="n">mTracker</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">now</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">scheduleTiming</span><span class="p">);</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> 
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">const</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">ScheduleResult</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">result</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">callback</span>-&gt;<span class="nc">schedule</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">scheduleTiming</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">*</span><span class="n">mTracker</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">now</span><span class="p">);</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">if</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">result</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">has_value</span><span class="p">())</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">return</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{};</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> 
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">if</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">callback</span>-&gt;<span class="nc">wakeupTime</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">mIntendedWakeupTime</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">-</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">mTimerSlack</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">rearmTimerSkippingUpdateFor</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">now</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">it</span><span class="p">);</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> 
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">return</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">result</span><span class="p">;</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
