</span><span class="lnt">42
</span><span class="lnt">43
</span><span class="lnt">44
</span><span class="lnt">45
</span><span class="lnt">46
</span><span class="lnt">47
</span><span class="lnt">48
</span><span class="lnt">49
</span><span class="lnt">50
</span><span class="lnt">51
</span><span class="lnt">52
</span><span class="lnt">53
</span><span class="lnt">54
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">// BufferState tracks the states in which a buffer slot can be.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="k">struct</span> <span class="nc">BufferState</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// All slots are initially FREE (not dequeued, queued, acquired, or shared).
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">BufferState</span><span class="p">()</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">:</span> <span class="n">mDequeueCount</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mQueueCount</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mAcquireCount</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mShared</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">false</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">uint32_t</span> <span class="n">mDequeueCount</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">uint32_t</span> <span class="n">mQueueCount</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">uint32_t</span> <span class="n">mAcquireCount</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">bool</span> <span class="n">mShared</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// A buffer can be in one of five states, represented as below:
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">//
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// | mShared | mDequeueCount | mQueueCount | mAcquireCount |
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// --------|---------|---------------|-------------|---------------|
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// FREE | false | 0 | 0 | 0 |
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// DEQUEUED| false | 1 | 0 | 0 |
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// QUEUED | false | 0 | 1 | 0 |
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// ACQUIRED| false | 0 | 0 | 1 |
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// SHARED | true | any | any | any |
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">//
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// FREE indicates that the buffer is available to be dequeued by the
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// producer. The slot is &#34;owned&#34; by BufferQueue. It transitions to DEQUEUED
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// when dequeueBuffer is called.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">//
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// DEQUEUED indicates that the buffer has been dequeued by the producer, but
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// has not yet been queued or canceled. The producer may modify the
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// buffer&#39;s contents as soon as the associated release fence is signaled.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// The slot is &#34;owned&#34; by the producer. It can transition to QUEUED (via
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// queueBuffer or attachBuffer) or back to FREE (via cancelBuffer or
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// detachBuffer).
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">//
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// QUEUED indicates that the buffer has been filled by the producer and
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// queued for use by the consumer. The buffer contents may continue to be
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// modified for a finite time, so the contents must not be accessed until
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// the associated fence is signaled. The slot is &#34;owned&#34; by BufferQueue. It
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// can transition to ACQUIRED (via acquireBuffer) or to FREE (if another
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// buffer is queued in asynchronous mode).
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">//
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// ACQUIRED indicates that the buffer has been acquired by the consumer. As
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// with QUEUED, the contents must not be accessed by the consumer until the
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// acquire fence is signaled. The slot is &#34;owned&#34; by the consumer. It
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// transitions to FREE when releaseBuffer (or detachBuffer) is called. A
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// detached buffer can also enter the ACQUIRED state via attachBuffer.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">//
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// SHARED indicates that this buffer is being used in shared buffer
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// mode. It can be in any combination of the other states at the same time,
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// except for FREE (since that excludes being in any other state). It can
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// also be dequeued, queued, or acquired multiple times.
</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>可以看到这里的BufferState就是我们常说的一下几个状态<br>
// FREE<br>
// DEQUEUED<br>
// QUEUED<br>
// ACQUIRED<br>
// SHARED<br>
但是大家可以看到，每一个状态并不是用类似enum这种变量的,而是用对对应整形计数变量表示，比如：<br>
inline void dequeue() {<br>
mDequeueCount++;<br>
}<br>
inline bool isDequeued() const {<br>
return mDequeueCount &gt; 0;<br>
}</p>
<p>isDequeued（）方法就是代表状态，dequeue就是操作变量，简单就是改变状态，都是使用各自计数来的</p>
<p>所有的状态方法如下：</p>

<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//是否为Free状态就是判断一下其他三个状态计数是否为0
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="kr">inline</span> <span class="kt">bool</span> <span class="nf">isFree</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="o">!</span><span class="n">isAcquired</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="o">!</span><span class="n">isDequeued</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="o">!</span><span class="n">isQueued</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kr">inline</span> <span class="kt">bool</span> <span class="nf">isDequeued</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">mDequeueCount</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kr">inline</span> <span class="kt">bool</span> <span class="nf">isQueued</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">mQueueCount</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kr">inline</span> <span class="kt">bool</span> <span class="nf">isAcquired</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">mAcquireCount</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kr">inline</span> <span class="kt">bool</span> <span class="nf">isShared</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">mShared</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kr">inline</span> <span class="kt">void</span> <span class="nf">reset</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">*</span><span class="k">this</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">BufferState</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="kt">char</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="nf">string</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="k">const</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kr">inline</span> <span class="kt">void</span> <span class="nf">dequeue</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">//dequeue操作就是简单的把mDequeueCount进行加操作
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">mDequeueCount</span><span class="o">++</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kr">inline</span> <span class="kt">void</span> <span class="nf">detachProducer</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mDequeueCount</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mDequeueCount</span><span class="o">--</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kr">inline</span> <span class="kt">void</span> <span class="nf">attachProducer</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mDequeueCount</span><span class="o">++</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kr">inline</span> <span class="kt">void</span> <span class="nf">queue</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">//会对mDequeueCount先进行减
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mDequeueCount</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mDequeueCount</span><span class="o">--</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">//再对mQueueCount进行加操作
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">mQueueCount</span><span class="o">++</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kr">inline</span> <span class="kt">void</span> <span class="nf">cancel</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mDequeueCount</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mDequeueCount</span><span class="o">--</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kr">inline</span> <span class="kt">void</span> <span class="nf">freeQueued</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mQueueCount</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mQueueCount</span><span class="o">--</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kr">inline</span> <span class="kt">void</span> <span class="nf">acquire</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">//首先对mQueueCount会进行减操作
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mQueueCount</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mQueueCount</span><span class="o">--</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">//然后再是对mAcquireCount进行加操作
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">mAcquireCount</span><span class="o">++</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kr">inline</span> <span class="kt">void</span> <span class="nf">acquireNotInQueue</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mAcquireCount</span><span class="o">++</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kr">inline</span> <span class="kt">void</span> <span class="nf">release</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="c1">//release只对mAcquireCount进行了减操作
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mAcquireCount</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mAcquireCount</span><span class="o">--</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kr">inline</span> <span class="kt">void</span> <span class="nf">detachConsumer</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mAcquireCount</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mAcquireCount</span><span class="o">--</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kr">inline</span> <span class="kt">void</span> <span class="nf">attachConsumer</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mAcquireCount</span><span class="o">++</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">};</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>总结图：</p>
<p><a class="lightgallery" href="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a6569a.png?size=large" data-thumbnail="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a6569a.png?size=small" data-sub-html="<h2>50bc4396c75da53dd274ea74ac7912e5_MD5</h2>"><img loading="lazy" src="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a6569a.png" alt="50bc4396c75da53dd274ea74ac7912e5_MD5" srcset="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a6569a.png?size=small, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a6569a.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a6569a.png?size=large 2x" data-title="50bc4396c75da53dd274ea74ac7912e5_MD5" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<p>补充一下几个状态转移图：<br>
<a class="lightgallery" href="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a23a8f.png?size=large" data-thumbnail="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a23a8f.png?size=small" data-sub-html="<h2>d6f32a1e45a4b0524b0b3930413fdac4_MD5</h2>"><img loading="lazy" src="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a23a8f.png" alt="d6f32a1e45a4b0524b0b3930413fdac4_MD5" srcset="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a23a8f.png?size=small, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a23a8f.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a23a8f.png?size=large 2x" data-title="d6f32a1e45a4b0524b0b3930413fdac4_MD5" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a><br>
–&gt;1、一开始如果什么都没发生那肯定BufferSlot对应BufferState是FREE状态<br>
-&mdash;&gt;2、生产者app一般先进行dequue操作，这个时候状态就变成了 DEQUEUE状态<br>
-&mdash;&mdash;&gt;3、生产者app dequeue获取了graphicbuffer后，绘制完成进行queue操作，变成了QUEUED状态<br>
-&mdash;&mdash;&mdash;&ndash;&gt;4、queuebuffer后通知消费者，消费者接受通知后，会进行acquire操作，这个时候状态变成了ACQUIRED<br>
-&mdash;&mdash;&mdash;&mdash;&ndash;&gt;5、消费者对buffer消费完成后就可以对bufferslot进行relaese操作，这个时候就变成FREE状态</p>
<h4 id="dequeuebuffer---生产者方法" class="heading-element"><span>dequeueBuffer() &ndash;生产者方法</span>
 <a href="#dequeuebuffer---%e7%94%9f%e4%ba%a7%e8%80%85%e6%96%b9%e6%b3%95" class="heading-mark">

</h4><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">

<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">status_t</span> <span class="n">BufferQueueProducer</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">dequeueBuffer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="kt">int</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">outSlot</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">android</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Fence</span><span class="o">&gt;*</span> <span class="n">outFence</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">uint32_t</span> <span class="n">width</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kt">uint32_t</span> <span class="n">height</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">PixelFormat</span> <span class="n">format</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">uint64_t</span> <span class="n">usage</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kt">uint64_t</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">outBufferAge</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">FrameEventHistoryDelta</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">outTimestamps</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">//省略
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="kt">int</span> <span class="n">found</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">BufferItem</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">INVALID_BUFFER_SLOT</span><span class="p">;</span><span class="c1">//作为入参found
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">while</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">found</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">BufferItem</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">INVALID_BUFFER_SLOT</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 		<span class="c1">//核心方法从mSlots数组找到一个可以用的BufferSlot,把相关的index赋值到found这个变量
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">status_t</span> <span class="n">status</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">waitForFreeSlotThenRelock</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">FreeSlotCaller</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Dequeue</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">lock</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">&amp;</span><span class="n">found</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">//省略
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ATRACE_FORMAT</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;dequeueBuffer found = %d&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="n">found</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">GraphicBuffer</span><span class="o">&gt;&amp;</span> <span class="n">buffer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mSlots</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">found</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="n">mGraphicBuffer</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">*</span><span class="n">outSlot</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">found</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ATRACE_BUFFER_INDEX</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">found</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">attachedByConsumer</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mSlots</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">found</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="n">mNeedsReallocation</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mSlots</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">found</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="n">mNeedsReallocation</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">false</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mSlots</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">found</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="n">mBufferState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">dequeue</span><span class="p">();</span><span class="c1">//把状态变成Dequeue
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">((</span><span class="n">buffer</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="k">nullptr</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">||</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">buffer</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">needsReallocation</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">width</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">height</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">format</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">BQ_LAYER_COUNT</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">usage</span><span class="p">))</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">//如果需要进行buffer申请
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">returnFlags</span> <span class="o">|=</span> <span class="n">BUFFER_NEEDS_REALLOCATION</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// We add 1 because that will be the frame number when this buffer
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// is queued
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mBufferAge</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mFrameCounter</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="n">mSlots</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">found</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="n">mFrameNumber</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//省略部分
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">returnFlags</span> <span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="n">BUFFER_NEEDS_REALLOCATION</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="c1">//不需要allocation
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mConsumerListener</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="k">nullptr</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="c1">//通知回调一下consumeronFrameDequeued
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mConsumerListener</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">onFrameDequeued</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mSlots</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="n">outSlot</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="n">mGraphicBuffer</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getId</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="c1">// Autolock scope
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">returnFlags</span> <span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="n">BUFFER_NEEDS_REALLOCATION</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">//开始申请GraphicBuffer
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">GraphicBuffer</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">graphicBuffer</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="k">new</span> <span class="n">GraphicBuffer</span><span class="p">(</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">width</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">height</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">format</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">BQ_LAYER_COUNT</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">usage</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">mConsumerName</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">string</span><span class="p">(),</span> <span class="n">mConsumerName</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">size</span><span class="p">()});</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">status_t</span> <span class="n">error</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">graphicBuffer</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">initCheck</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">//申请GraphicBuffer成功
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">error</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">NO_ERROR</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="o">!</span><span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mIsAbandoned</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">graphicBuffer</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">setGenerationNumber</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mGenerationNumber</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">//把申请成功的buffer赋值到了mSlots的mGraphicBuffer中
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">mSlots</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="n">outSlot</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="n">mGraphicBuffer</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">graphicBuffer</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mConsumerListener</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="k">nullptr</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mConsumerListener</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">onFrameDequeued</span><span class="p">(</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mSlots</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="n">outSlot</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="n">mGraphicBuffer</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getId</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="c1">// Autolock scope
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">//省略
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">returnFlags</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>接下来看看核心方法waitForFreeSlotThenRelock</p>

<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">status_t</span> <span class="n">BufferQueueProducer</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">waitForFreeSlotThenRelock</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">FreeSlotCaller</span> <span class="n">caller</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">unique_lock</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">mutex</span><span class="o">&gt;&amp;</span> <span class="n">lock</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kt">int</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">found</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">while</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">tryAgain</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">int</span> <span class="n">dequeuedCount</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">int</span> <span class="n">acquiredCount</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="kt">int</span> <span class="nl">s</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mActiveBuffers</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mSlots</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">s</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="n">mBufferState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">isDequeued</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">++</span><span class="n">dequeuedCount</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mSlots</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">s</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="n">mBufferState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">isAcquired</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">++</span><span class="n">acquiredCount</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">*</span><span class="n">found</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">BufferQueueCore</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">INVALID_BUFFER_SLOT</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//省略部分
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">tooManyBuffers</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// If in shared buffer mode and a shared buffer exists, always
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// return it.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mSharedBufferMode</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mSharedBufferSlot</span> <span class="o">!=</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">BufferQueueCore</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">INVALID_BUFFER_SLOT</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">*</span><span class="n">found</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mSharedBufferSlot</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">caller</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">FreeSlotCaller</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Dequeue</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="c1">//如果dequeue方法
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// If we&#39;re calling this from dequeue, prefer free buffers
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="kt">int</span> <span class="n">slot</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">getFreeBufferLocked</span><span class="p">();</span><span class="c1">//先从FreeBuffer的数组中获取
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">slot</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">BufferQueueCore</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">INVALID_BUFFER_SLOT</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">*</span><span class="n">found</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">slot</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="nf">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mAllowAllocation</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="c1">//如果没有找到则到FreeSlot数组中找
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="n">found</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">getFreeSlotLocked</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// If we&#39;re calling this from attach, prefer free slots
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="kt">int</span> <span class="n">slot</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">getFreeSlotLocked</span><span class="p">();</span><span class="c1">//先从FreeSlot数组中找
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">slot</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">BufferQueueCore</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">INVALID_BUFFER_SLOT</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">*</span><span class="n">found</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">slot</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="c1">//没找到再去FreeBuffer中找
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="n">found</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">getFreeBufferLocked</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//省略
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">NO_ERROR</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kt">int</span> <span class="n">BufferQueueProducer</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">getFreeSlotLocked</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mFreeSlots</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">empty</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">BufferQueueCore</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">INVALID_BUFFER_SLOT</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">int</span> <span class="n">slot</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mFreeSlots</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">begin</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mFreeSlots</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">erase</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">slot</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">slot</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>上面waitForFreeSlotThenRelock就是其实就是去FreeBuffer或者FreeSlot中寻找一个BufferSlot，返回这个slot的在数组的index,赋值给found</p>
<p>dequeueBuffer主要干的事情如下：<br>
1、通过waitForFreeSlotThenRelock寻找到Free状态的BufferSlot<br>
2、判断这个BufferSlot是否需要重新申请buffer，如果需要则进行构造新的GraphicBuffer</p>
<h4 id="requestbuffer生产者方法" class="heading-element"><span>requestBuffer()–生产者方法</span>
 <a href="#requestbuffer%e7%94%9f%e4%ba%a7%e8%80%85%e6%96%b9%e6%b3%95" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>主要就是实现了根据传递进来的slot这个index，然后吧对应mSlots的mGraphicBuffer赋值给参数buf指针</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">status_t</span> <span class="n">BufferQueueProducer</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">requestBuffer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="kt">int</span> <span class="n">slot</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">GraphicBuffer</span><span class="o">&gt;*</span> <span class="n">buf</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mSlots</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">slot</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="n">mRequestBufferCalled</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">true</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">*</span><span class="n">buf</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mSlots</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">slot</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="n">mGraphicBuffer</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">NO_ERROR</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h4 id="queuebuffer生产者方法" class="heading-element"><span>queueBuffer()–生产者方法</span>

<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//注意传递参数里面有一个关键的slot即mSlots中的index
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="n">status_t</span> <span class="n">BufferQueueProducer</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">queueBuffer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="kt">int</span> <span class="n">slot</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">QueueBufferInput</span> <span class="o">&amp;</span><span class="n">input</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">QueueBufferOutput</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="n">output</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">BufferItem</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mSlots</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">slot</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="n">mFence</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">acquireFence</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mSlots</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">slot</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="n">mBufferState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">queue</span><span class="p">();</span><span class="c1">//这个地方就会调用mBufferState的queue，状态就改变了
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">				<span class="c1">//开始把mSlots[slot]挨个赋值给BufferItem
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">mAcquireCalled</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mSlots</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">slot</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="n">mAcquireCalled</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">mGraphicBuffer</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mSlots</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">slot</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="n">mGraphicBuffer</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">mCrop</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">crop</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">mTransform</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">transform</span> <span class="o">&amp;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">~</span><span class="k">static_cast</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="kt">uint32_t</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">NATIVE_WINDOW_TRANSFORM_INVERSE_DISPLAY</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">mTransformToDisplayInverse</span> <span class="o">=</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">transform</span> <span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="n">NATIVE_WINDOW_TRANSFORM_INVERSE_DISPLAY</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">mScalingMode</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="k">static_cast</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="kt">uint32_t</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">scalingMode</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">mTimestamp</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">requestedPresentTimestamp</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">mIsAutoTimestamp</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">isAutoTimestamp</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">mDataSpace</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">dataSpace</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">mHdrMetadata</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">hdrMetadata</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">mFrameNumber</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">currentFrameNumber</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">mSlot</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">slot</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">mFence</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">acquireFence</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">mFenceTime</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">acquireFenceTime</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">mIsDroppable</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mAsyncMode</span> <span class="o">||</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mConsumerIsSurfaceFlinger</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mQueueBufferCanDrop</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">||</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mLegacyBufferDrop</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mQueueBufferCanDrop</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">||</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mSharedBufferMode</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mSharedBufferSlot</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">slot</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">mSurfaceDamage</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">surfaceDamage</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">mQueuedBuffer</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">true</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">mAutoRefresh</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mSharedBufferMode</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mAutoRefresh</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">mApi</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mConnectedApi</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mQueue</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">empty</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="c1">//如果mQueue为空
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mQueue</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">push_back</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">item</span><span class="p">);</span><span class="c1">//直接push到mQueue的
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">frameAvailableListener</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mConsumerListener</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// When the queue is not empty, we need to look at the last buffer
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// in the queue to see if we need to replace it
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">BufferItem</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="n">last</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mQueue</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">itemAt</span><span class="p">(</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mQueue</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">size</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">);</span><span class="c1">//获取末尾的Item
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">//判断末尾Item是不是可以被丢弃的
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">last</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">mIsDroppable</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">			<span class="c1">//省略
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mQueue</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">push_back</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">item</span><span class="p">);</span><span class="c1">//直接push
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">frameAvailableListener</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mConsumerListener</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">frameAvailableListener</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="k">nullptr</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">frameAvailableListener</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">onFrameAvailable</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">item</span><span class="p">);</span><span class="c1">//这里核心部分，会调用到消费者的onFrameAvailable
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="nf">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">frameReplacedListener</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="k">nullptr</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">frameReplacedListener</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">onFrameReplaced</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">item</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">NO_ERROR</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>上面queueBuffer主要干了以下几件事：<br>
1、根据入参slot，把mSlots中的BufferState变成Queued状态<br>
2、根据BufferSlot相关变量构建出一个新的BufferItem对象，且塞入mQueue集合<br>
3、最后通过onFrameAvailable通知消费者</p>
<h4 id="onframeavailable" class="heading-element"><span>onFrameAvailable</span>

<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">BLASTBufferQueue</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">onFrameAvailable</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">BufferItem</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">function</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="kt">void</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">SurfaceComposerClient</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Transaction</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">prevCallback</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="k">nullptr</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">SurfaceComposerClient</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Transaction</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">prevTransaction</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="k">nullptr</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">bool</span> <span class="n">waitForTransactionCallback</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="o">!</span><span class="n">mSyncedFrameNumbers</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">empty</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ATRACE_CALL</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">BBQ_TRACE</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">unique_lock</span> <span class="n">_lock</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="n">mMutex</span><span class="p">};</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="kt">bool</span> <span class="n">syncTransactionSet</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mTransactionReadyCallback</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="k">nullptr</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">BQA_LOGV</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;onFrameAvailable-start syncTransactionSet=%s&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">boolToString</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">syncTransactionSet</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">syncTransactionSet</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">bool</span> <span class="n">mayNeedToWaitForBuffer</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">true</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// If we are going to re-use the same mSyncTransaction, release the buffer that may
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// already be set in the Transaction. This is to allow us a free slot early to continue
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// processing a new buffer.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">mAcquireSingleBuffer</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">bufferData</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mSyncTransaction</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getAndClearBuffer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mSurfaceControl</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">bufferData</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">BQA_LOGD</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;Releasing previous buffer when syncing: framenumber=%&#34;</span> <span class="n">PRIu64</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">bufferData</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">frameNumber</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">releaseBuffer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">bufferData</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">generateReleaseCallbackId</span><span class="p">(),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">bufferData</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">acquireFence</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Because we just released a buffer, we know there&#39;s no need to wait for a free
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// buffer.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">mayNeedToWaitForBuffer</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">false</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mayNeedToWaitForBuffer</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">flushAndWaitForFreeBuffer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_lock</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// add to shadow queue
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">mNumFrameAvailable</span><span class="o">++</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">waitForTransactionCallback</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="n">mNumFrameAvailable</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">acquireAndReleaseBuffer</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ATRACE_INT</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mQueuedBufferTrace</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">c_str</span><span class="p">(),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mNumFrameAvailable</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">mNumAcquired</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="n">mPendingRelease</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">size</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">BQA_LOGV</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;onFrameAvailable framenumber=%&#34;</span> <span class="n">PRIu64</span> <span class="s">&#34; syncTransactionSet=%s&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">mFrameNumber</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">boolToString</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">syncTransactionSet</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ATRACE_FORMAT</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;onFrameAvailable syncTransactionSet = %d&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="n">syncTransactionSet</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">syncTransactionSet</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">acquireNextBufferLocked</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mSyncTransaction</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Only need a commit callback when syncing to ensure the buffer that&#39;s synced has been
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// sent to SF
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">incStrong</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="kt">void</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="n">transactionCommittedCallbackThunk</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mSyncTransaction</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">addTransactionCommittedCallback</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">transactionCommittedCallbackThunk</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">static_cast</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="kt">void</span><span class="o">*&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="k">this</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mSyncedFrameNumbers</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">emplace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">item</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">mFrameNumber</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mAcquireSingleBuffer</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">prevCallback</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mTransactionReadyCallback</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">prevTransaction</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mSyncTransaction</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mTransactionReadyCallback</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="k">nullptr</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mSyncTransaction</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="k">nullptr</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="nf">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">waitForTransactionCallback</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">acquireNextBufferLocked</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">nullopt</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">prevCallback</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">prevCallback</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">prevTransaction</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
