<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//注意这有个入参outBuffer
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="n">status_t</span> <span class="n">BufferQueueConsumer</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">acquireBuffer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BufferItem</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">outBuffer</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">nsecs_t</span> <span class="n">expectedPresent</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kt">uint64_t</span> <span class="n">maxFrameNumber</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">BufferQueueCore</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Fifo</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">iterator</span> <span class="n">front</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mQueue</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">begin</span><span class="p">());</span><span class="c1">//注意这个front就是mQueue的第一个
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//省略
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sharedBufferAvailable</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mQueue</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">empty</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="nf">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">acquireNonDroppableBuffer</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="n">front</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mIsDroppable</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">NO_BUFFER_AVAILABLE</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">//把front的slot及指向对象赋值给outBuffer这个入参
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">slot</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">front</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mSlot</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">*</span><span class="n">outBuffer</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="n">front</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">outBuffer</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mIsStale</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mSlots</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">slot</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="n">mAcquireCalled</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">true</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mQueue</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">empty</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mSlots</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">slot</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="n">mBufferState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">acquireNotInQueue</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">//下面就是BufferState进行相关的改变，调用acquire方法
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">mSlots</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">slot</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="n">mBufferState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">acquire</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mSlots</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">slot</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="n">mFence</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Fence</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">NO_FENCE</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">			<span class="c1">//mQueue中移除掉这个front
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mQueue</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">erase</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">front</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">NO_ERROR</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>可以看到acquireBuffer主要干的事情如：<br>
1、mQueue中取出最顶部的BufferItem</p>
<p>2、把顶部的BufferItem的slot获取，且让入参outBuffer指向该BufferItem</p>
<p>3、把mSlots中对应的BufferState变成acquired，且mQueue移除掉front</p>
<h4 id="releasebuffer消费者方法" class="heading-element"><span>releaseBuffer()–消费者方法</span>
 <a href="#releasebuffer%e6%b6%88%e8%b4%b9%e8%80%85%e6%96%b9%e6%b3%95" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span><span class="lnt">23
</span><span class="lnt">24
</span><span class="lnt">25
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">status_t</span> <span class="n">BufferQueueConsumer</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">releaseBuffer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="kt">int</span> <span class="n">slot</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kt">uint64_t</span> <span class="n">frameNumber</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">Fence</span><span class="o">&gt;&amp;</span> <span class="n">releaseFence</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">EGLDisplay</span> <span class="n">eglDisplay</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">EGLSyncKHR</span> <span class="n">eglFence</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">IProducerListener</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">listener</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">{</span> <span class="c1">// Autolock scope
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">lock_guard</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">mutex</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">lock</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mMutex</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">//省略部分
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">mSlots</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">slot</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="n">mEglDisplay</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">eglDisplay</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mSlots</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">slot</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="n">mEglFence</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">eglFence</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mSlots</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">slot</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="n">mFence</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">releaseFence</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">//最重要调用了mBufferState的release方法
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">mSlots</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">slot</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="n">mBufferState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">release</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">//省略部分
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">//下面就把slot从 mCore-&gt;mActiveBuffers移除，放入到 mCore-&gt;mFreeBuffers
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">mSlots</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">slot</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="n">mBufferState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">isShared</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mActiveBuffers</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">erase</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">slot</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mCore</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mFreeBuffers</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">push_back</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">slot</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">//省略部分
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">NO_ERROR</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>整个release方法就干了2件事<br>
1、调用了mBufferState的release方法，让状态就变成了FREE</p>
<p>2、从 mCore-&gt;mActiveBuffers移除，放入到 mCore-&gt;mFreeBuffers</p>
<p>相关release触发流程，这里以perffetto来结合代码看<br>
每次的sf在合成时候都会触发上一帧画面的releaseBuffer操作<br>
<a class="lightgallery" href="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a56dde.png?size=large" data-thumbnail="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a56dde.png?size=small" data-sub-html="<h2>894b67906bcef20ff825d08965c410bb_MD5</h2>"><img loading="lazy" src="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a56dde.png" alt="894b67906bcef20ff825d08965c410bb_MD5" srcset="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a56dde.png?size=small, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a56dde.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a56dde.png?size=large 2x" data-title="894b67906bcef20ff825d08965c410bb_MD5" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<p>但是刚启动第一帧明显没有看到有releaseBuffer，第二帧才看见<br>
第一帧，只见到了onTransactionCompleted：<br>
<a class="lightgallery" href="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3917f5b.png?size=large" data-thumbnail="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3917f5b.png?size=small" data-sub-html="<h2>1b24821c946d36574a0877a9eba868a5_MD5</h2>"><img loading="lazy" src="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3917f5b.png" alt="1b24821c946d36574a0877a9eba868a5_MD5" srcset="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3917f5b.png?size=small, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3917f5b.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3917f5b.png?size=large 2x" data-title="1b24821c946d36574a0877a9eba868a5_MD5" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a><br>
第二帧，见到了onTransactionCompleted同时，也见到了releaseBuffer相关，因为这次release是上一帧的buffer：<br>
<a class="lightgallery" href="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f392ea0e.png?size=large" data-thumbnail="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f392ea0e.png?size=small" data-sub-html="<h2>1ac3796f46f844888ecc16b81807dbae_MD5</h2>"><img loading="lazy" src="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f392ea0e.png" alt="1ac3796f46f844888ecc16b81807dbae_MD5" srcset="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f392ea0e.png?size=small, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f392ea0e.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f392ea0e.png?size=large 2x" data-title="1ac3796f46f844888ecc16b81807dbae_MD5" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a><br>
看看前后两次差异到底在哪里？为啥第一次就没有releaseBuffer相关调用，第二次就有了呢？<br>
看一下onTransactionCompleted方法的差异化执行：</p>

<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">TransactionCompletedListener</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">onTransactionCompleted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ListenerStats</span> <span class="n">listenerStats</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">unordered_map</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">CallbackId</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">CallbackTranslation</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">CallbackIdHash</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">callbacksMap</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">multimap</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="kt">int32_t</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">JankDataListener</span><span class="o">&gt;&gt;</span> <span class="n">jankListenersMap</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ATRACE_CALL</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// handle on complete callbacks
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="k">auto</span> <span class="nl">callbackId</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">transactionStats</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">callbackIds</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">callbackId</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">type</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">CallbackId</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Type</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">ON_COMPLETE</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">continue</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">auto</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">callbackFunction</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">callbackSurfaceControls</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">callbacksMap</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">callbackId</span><span class="p">];</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">callbackFunction</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGE</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;cannot call null callback function, skipping&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">continue</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">vector</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">SurfaceControlStats</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">surfaceControlStats</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="nl">surfaceStats</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">transactionStats</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">surfaceStats</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">surfaceControlStats</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">.</span><span class="n">emplace_back</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">callbacksMap</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">callbackId</span><span class="p">]</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">.</span><span class="n">surfaceControls</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">surfaceStats</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">surfaceControl</span><span class="p">],</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">transactionStats</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">latchTime</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">surfaceStats</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">acquireTimeOrFence</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">transactionStats</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">presentFence</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">surfaceStats</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">previousReleaseFence</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">surfaceStats</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">transformHint</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">surfaceStats</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">eventStats</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">surfaceStats</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">currentMaxAcquiredBufferCount</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">callbacksMap</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">callbackId</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="n">surfaceControls</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">surfaceStats</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">surfaceControl</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">callbacksMap</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">callbackId</span><span class="p">]</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">.</span><span class="n">surfaceControls</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">surfaceStats</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">surfaceControl</span><span class="p">]</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">setTransformHint</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">surfaceStats</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">transformHint</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">//这里就是是否会执行releaseBuffer的关键，靠传递过来的previousReleaseCallbackId是不是有效
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">surfaceStats</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">previousReleaseCallbackId</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">ReleaseCallbackId</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">INVALID_ID</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ReleaseBufferCallback</span> <span class="n">callback</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">scoped_lock</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">mutex</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">lock</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mMutex</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">callback</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">popReleaseBufferCallbackLocked</span><span class="p">(</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">surfaceStats</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">previousReleaseCallbackId</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">callback</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">callback</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">surfaceStats</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">previousReleaseCallbackId</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">surfaceStats</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">previousReleaseFence</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">?</span> <span class="n">surfaceStats</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nl">previousReleaseFence</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Fence</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">NO_FENCE</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">surfaceStats</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">currentMaxAcquiredBufferCount</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">callbackFunction</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">transactionStats</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">latchTime</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">transactionStats</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">presentFence</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">surfaceControlStats</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//省略
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>这里的previousReleaseCallbackId设置其实服务端sf进行的设置，下面会进行详细介绍。</p>
<h3 id="sf如何触发的release呢" class="heading-element"><span>sf如何触发的release呢？</span>
 <a href="#sf%e5%a6%82%e4%bd%95%e8%a7%a6%e5%8f%91%e7%9a%84release%e5%91%a2" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>触发流程如下：<br>
sf端是在线程中发起的触发跨进程onTransactionCompleted调用<br>
<a class="lightgallery" href="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f39d75ba.png?size=large" data-thumbnail="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f39d75ba.png?size=small" data-sub-html="<h2>849c2feac850bd4f7b02a98054624cc5_MD5</h2>"><img loading="lazy" src="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f39d75ba.png" alt="849c2feac850bd4f7b02a98054624cc5_MD5" srcset="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f39d75ba.png?size=small, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f39d75ba.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f39d75ba.png?size=large 2x" data-title="849c2feac850bd4f7b02a98054624cc5_MD5" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a>这里sf子线程跨进程调用是由主线程sendCallbacks方法触发的</p>
<p><a class="lightgallery" href="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a59508.png?size=large" data-thumbnail="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a59508.png?size=small" data-sub-html="<h2>210fc5be8b42e6219b9cf2a73756fc55_MD5</h2>"><img loading="lazy" src="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a59508.png" alt="210fc5be8b42e6219b9cf2a73756fc55_MD5" srcset="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a59508.png?size=small, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a59508.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a59508.png?size=large 2x" data-title="210fc5be8b42e6219b9cf2a73756fc55_MD5" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<h4 id="sendcallbacks方法" class="heading-element"><span>sendCallbacks方法</span>
 <a href="#sendcallbacks%e6%96%b9%e6%b3%95" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span><span class="lnt">23
</span><span class="lnt">24
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">TransactionCallbackInvoker</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">sendCallbacks</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="kt">bool</span> <span class="n">onCommitOnly</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ATRACE_CALL</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// For each listener
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">//获取全局的mCompletedTransactions变量再进行遍历
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">completedTransactionsItr</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mCompletedTransactions</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">begin</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">BackgroundExecutor</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Callbacks</span> <span class="n">callbacks</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">while</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">completedTransactionsItr</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">mCompletedTransactions</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">//省略部分
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// If the listener has completed transactions
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">listenerStats</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">transactionStats</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">empty</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// If the listener is still alive
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">listener</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">isBinderAlive</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">//塞入callbacks集合
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">callbacks</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">emplace_back</span><span class="p">([</span><span class="n">stats</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">listenerStats</span><span class="p">)]()</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ATRACE_NAME</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;ITransactionCompletedListener onTransactionCompleted&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">interface_cast</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">ITransactionCompletedListener</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">stats</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">listener</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">onTransactionCompleted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">stats</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">});</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">completedTransactionsItr</span><span class="o">++</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">BackgroundExecutor</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">getInstance</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">sendCallbacks</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">callbacks</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>重点看看mCompletedTransactions这个集合的哪来的，通过查询主要是findOrCreateTransactionStats方法进行加入相关的元素，追踪后发现实际上这里主要是看addCallbackHandles方法会填入对应，最终发现是在releasePendingBuffer方法中塞入：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">BufferStateLayer</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">releasePendingBuffer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">nsecs_t</span> <span class="n">dequeueReadyTime</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="nl">handle</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">mDrawingState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">callbackHandles</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">handle</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">transformHint</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mTransformHint</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">handle</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">dequeueReadyTime</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">dequeueReadyTime</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">handle</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">currentMaxAcquiredBufferCount</span> <span class="o">=</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mFlinger</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getMaxAcquiredBufferCountForCurrentRefreshRate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mOwnerUid</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//注意这里是把mPreviousReleaseCallbackId变量赋值给 handle-&gt;previousReleaseCallbackId 
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="k">auto</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="nl">handle</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">mDrawingState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">callbackHandles</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">handle</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">releasePreviousBuffer</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mDrawingState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">releaseBufferEndpoint</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">handle</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">listener</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">handle</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">previousReleaseCallbackId</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mPreviousReleaseCallbackId</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">break</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">//调用addCallbackHandles
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">mFlinger</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getTransactionCallbackInvoker</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">addCallbackHandles</span><span class="p">(</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mDrawingState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">callbackHandles</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">jankData</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>这里的mPreviousReleaseCallbackId是哪里来的呢？那么就需要看updateActiveBuffer</p>
<h4 id="updateactivebuffer" class="heading-element"><span>updateActiveBuffer</span>
 <a href="#updateactivebuffer" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>updateActiveBuffer方法会对mPreviousReleaseCallbackId这个变量进行赋值，大家注意这里的为啥叫做前一帧的CallbackId，因为下面这个updateActiveBuffer就是赋值是先进行的mPreviousReleaseCallbackId赋值，然后才进行的新buffer的赋值，所以这个mPreviousReleaseCallbackId其实上一个的buffer的Id，不是当前这次的<br>
<a class="lightgallery" href="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a78c9f.png?size=large" data-thumbnail="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a78c9f.png?size=small" data-sub-html="<h2>d737d59c99c0b3a2082b4aefdcb0ca4d_MD5</h2>"><img loading="lazy" src="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a78c9f.png" alt="d737d59c99c0b3a2082b4aefdcb0ca4d_MD5" srcset="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a78c9f.png?size=small, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a78c9f.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/29/66f92f3a78c9f.png?size=large 2x" data-title="d737d59c99c0b3a2082b4aefdcb0ca4d_MD5" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<p>综上既可以解释releaseBuffer是在下一帧上帧后才由sf调用到app层面让其releaseBuffer。</p>

item.title: Android13 SurfaceFlinger onComposerHalRefresh流程分析_android 13 surfaceflinge变化-CSDN博客
item.author: huang8604@163.com (wentao)
item.description:
<p>onComposerHalRefresh方法是SurfaceFlinger中的一个函数。该方法的作用是在Composer <a href="https://so.csdn.net/so/search?q=HAL%5c&amp;spm=1001.2101.3001.7020"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">HAL</a>刷新时被调用，用于更新显示内容。onComposerHalRefresh方法会在SurfaceFlinger接收到Composer HAL刷新事件时被调用。Composer HAL是硬件抽象层的一部分，负责与硬件显示设备进行通信。当Composer HAL完成一次刷新操作后，会通知SurfaceFlinger进行相应的处理。</p>
<p>在onComposerHalRefresh方法中，SurfaceFlinger会执行一系列操作，包括更新屏幕上的图像内容、处理显示层的合成和混合等。通过这些操作，SurfaceFlinger能够将应用程序的图像内容正确地显示在屏幕上。</p>
<p>SurfaceFlinger的onComposerHalRefresh方法代码如下：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Surfaceflinger.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">SurfaceFlinger</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">onComposerHalRefresh</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">hal</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">HWDisplayId</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">Mutex</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Autolock</span> <span class="n">lock</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mStateLock</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">scheduleComposite</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">FrameHint</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">kNone</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h2 id="surfaceflinger-schedulecomposite" class="heading-element"><span>SurfaceFlinger scheduleComposite</span>
 <a href="#surfaceflinger-schedulecomposite" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>调用SurfaceFlinger的scheduleComposite方法：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Surfaceflinger.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">SurfaceFlinger</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">scheduleComposite</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">FrameHint</span> <span class="n">hint</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mMustComposite</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">true</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">scheduleCommit</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">hint</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>调用scheduleCommit方法：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span><span class="lnt">6
</span><span class="lnt">7
</span><span class="lnt">8
</span><span class="lnt">9
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Surfaceflinger.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">unique_ptr</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">scheduler</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Scheduler</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">mScheduler</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">SurfaceFlinger</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">scheduleCommit</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">FrameHint</span> <span class="n">hint</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">hint</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">FrameHint</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">kActive</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mScheduler</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">resetIdleTimer</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mPowerAdvisor</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">notifyDisplayUpdateImminent</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mScheduler</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">scheduleFrame</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h3 id="messagequeue-scheduleframe" class="heading-element"><span>MessageQueue scheduleFrame</span>
 <a href="#messagequeue-scheduleframe" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>调用Scheduler的scheduleFrame方法，Scheduler继承MessageQueue，调用MessageQueue的scheduleFrame方法：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Scheduler/MessageQueue.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">MessageQueue</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">scheduleFrame</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ATRACE_CALL</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">lock_guard</span> <span class="n">lock</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mInjector</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">mutex</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">CC_UNLIKELY</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mInjector</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">connection</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGD</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;%s while injecting VSYNC&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">__FUNCTION__</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">//请求下一个 VSync 信号
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">mInjector</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">connection</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">requestNextVsync</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">lock_guard</span> <span class="n">lock</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mVsync</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">mutex</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mVsync</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">scheduledFrameTime</span> <span class="o">=</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mVsync</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">registration</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">schedule</span><span class="p">({.</span><span class="n">workDuration</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mVsync</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">workDuration</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">count</span><span class="p">(),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">.</span><span class="n">readyDuration</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">.</span><span class="n">earliestVsync</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mVsync</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">lastCallbackTime</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">count</span><span class="p">()});</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>调用了VSyncCallbackRegistration的schedule方法：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span><span class="lnt">6
</span><span class="lnt">7
</span><span class="lnt">8
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Scheduler/VSyncCallbackRegistration.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">reference_wrapper</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">VSyncDispatch</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">mDispatch</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">ScheduleResult</span> <span class="n">VSyncCallbackRegistration</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">schedule</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">VSyncDispatch</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">ScheduleTiming</span> <span class="n">scheduleTiming</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">mValidToken</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">nullopt</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">mDispatch</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">schedule</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mToken</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">scheduleTiming</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h4 id="vsyncdispatchtimerqueue-schedule" class="heading-element"><span>VSyncDispatchTimerQueue schedule</span>
 <a href="#vsyncdispatchtimerqueue-schedule" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>调用mDispatch(VSyncDispatch)的schedule方法，实际调用的是VSyncDispatchTimerQueue的schedule方法：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span><span class="lnt">23
</span><span class="lnt">24
</span><span class="lnt">25
</span><span class="lnt">26
</span><span class="lnt">27
</span><span class="lnt">28
</span><span class="lnt">29
</span><span class="lnt">30
</span><span class="lnt">31
</span></code></pre></td>

<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Scheduler/VSyncDispatchTimerQueue.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="n">ScheduleResult</span> <span class="n">VSyncDispatchTimerQueueEntry</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">schedule</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">VSyncDispatch</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">ScheduleTiming</span> <span class="n">timing</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">VSyncTracker</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="n">tracker</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">nsecs_t</span> <span class="n">now</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">nextVsyncTime</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">tracker</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">nextAnticipatedVSyncTimeFrom</span><span class="p">(</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">max</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">timing</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">earliestVsync</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">now</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">timing</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">workDuration</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">timing</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">readyDuration</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">nextWakeupTime</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">nextVsyncTime</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="n">timing</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">workDuration</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="n">timing</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">readyDuration</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">bool</span> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">wouldSkipAVsyncTarget</span> <span class="o">=</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mArmedInfo</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">nextVsyncTime</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mArmedInfo</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mActualVsyncTime</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">mMinVsyncDistance</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">bool</span> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">wouldSkipAWakeup</span> <span class="o">=</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mArmedInfo</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="p">((</span><span class="n">nextWakeupTime</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mArmedInfo</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mActualWakeupTime</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">mMinVsyncDistance</span><span class="p">)));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">wouldSkipAVsyncTarget</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="n">wouldSkipAWakeup</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nf">getExpectedCallbackTime</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">nextVsyncTime</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">timing</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">bool</span> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">alreadyDispatchedForVsync</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mLastDispatchTime</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">((</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="n">mLastDispatchTime</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">mMinVsyncDistance</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="n">nextVsyncTime</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="n">mLastDispatchTime</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="n">mMinVsyncDistance</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="n">nextVsyncTime</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">alreadyDispatchedForVsync</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">nextVsyncTime</span> <span class="o">=</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">tracker</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">nextAnticipatedVSyncTimeFrom</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="n">mLastDispatchTime</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">mMinVsyncDistance</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">nextWakeupTime</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">nextVsyncTime</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="n">timing</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">workDuration</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="n">timing</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">readyDuration</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// 如果计时器线程即将运行，通过回调计时器重新计算应用此工作更新，以避免取消即将触发的回调。
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">nextReadyTime</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">nextVsyncTime</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="n">timing</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">readyDuration</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mScheduleTiming</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">timing</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mArmedInfo</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">nextWakeupTime</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">nextVsyncTime</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">nextReadyTime</span><span class="p">};</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nf">getExpectedCallbackTime</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">nextVsyncTime</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">timing</span><span class="p">);</span>
